trigger.custom:
function(states, event, arg1, arg2, arg3)
    if event == "OPTIONS" then
        states[""] = {
            text = "",
            icon = 1323035,
            progressType = "static",
            changed = true,
            show = true
        }
        return true
    end
    if event == "HYLB_TOPLEFT" and arg1 and arg2 then
        states[""] = {
            text = arg2,
            icon = arg1,
            progressType = "static",
            changed = true,
            show = true
        }
        aura_env.handle()
        return true
    elseif event == "HYLB_RESET" and arg1 then
        aura_env.handle(true)
        if states[""] then
            states[""].show = false
            states[""].changed = true
        end
        return true
    elseif (event == "HYLB_TOPRIGHT" or event == "HYLB_BOTTOMLEFT" or event == "HYLB_BOTTOMRIGHT") and arg3 then
        aura_env.region["button"..arg3]:Hide()
    end
end

function(states, event, ...)
    if event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" and ... then
        local _, message, _, srcGUID, srcName, _, _, destGUID, destName, _, _, spellid = ...
        if message == "SPELL_AURA_APPLIED"
        and destGUID == WeakAuras.myGUID
        and spellid == 346427
        then
            states[""] = {
                name = "Titanic Insight",
                icon = 135918,
                duration = 15,
                expirationTime = GetTime() + 15,
                progressType = "timed",
                autoHide = true,
                changed = true,
                show = true,
            }
        elseif message == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED"
        and destGUID == WeakAuras.myGUID
        and spellid == 346427
        and states[""]
        then
            states[""].show = false
            states[""].changed = true
            return true
        end
    end
end

init.custom:
local t = {
    [1] = {"TOPLEFT", 1323035, "BLUE", "{rt6}"},
    [2] = {"TOPRIGHT", 1323037, "PURPLE", "{rt3}"},
    [3] = {"BOTTOMLEFT", 1323038, "YELLOW", "{rt1}"},
    [4] = {"BOTTOMRIGHT", 1323039, "ORANGE", "{rt2}"},
}

local name = "HYLB"
local w, h = aura_env.region:GetSize()
for i=1, 4 do
    aura_env.region["button"..i] = aura_env.region["button"..i] or CreateFrame("Button", name..i, aura_env.region)
    aura_env.region["button"..i]:SetSize(w/2, h/2)
    aura_env.region["button"..i]:SetPoint(t[i][1])
    aura_env.region["button"..i]:SetScript("OnClick", function()
            WeakAuras.ScanEvents("HYLB_TOPLEFT", t[i][2], t[i][3], i, t[i][4])
    end)
    
    aura_env.region["button"..i]:SetNormalTexture(t[i][2])
    aura_env.region["button"..i]:SetHighlightTexture("Interface\\QuestFrame\\UI-QuestLogTitleHighlight", "ADD")
end

aura_env.handle = function(show)
    for i=1, 4 do
        if show then
            aura_env.region["button"..i]:Show()
        else
            aura_env.region["button"..i]:Hide()
        end
    end
end
aura_env.handle(not WeakAuras.IsOptionsOpen())

start.custom:
if not WeakAuras.IsOptionsOpen() then
    aura_env.handle(true)
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4)
    if event == "HYLB_RESET" and arg1 then
        aura_env.topLeft = false
        aura_env.topRight = false
        aura_env.bottomLeft = false
        aura_env.bottomRight = false
        
        aura_env.topLeftM = ""
        aura_env.topRightM = ""
        aura_env.bottomLeftM = ""
        aura_env.bottomRightM = ""
    elseif event == "HYLB_TOPLEFT" and arg2 then
        aura_env.topLeft = arg2
        aura_env.topLeftM = arg4 or ""
    elseif event == "HYLB_TOPRIGHT" and arg2 then
        aura_env.topRight = arg2
        aura_env.topRightM = arg4 or ""
    elseif event == "HYLB_BOTTOMLEFT" and arg2 then
        aura_env.bottomLeft = arg2
        aura_env.bottomLeftM = arg4 or ""
    elseif event == "HYLB_BOTTOMRIGHT" and arg2 then
        aura_env.bottomRight = arg2
        aura_env.bottomRightM = arg4 or ""
    elseif event == "HYLB_SEND" and arg1 
    and aura_env.topLeft and aura_env.topRight
    and aura_env.bottomLeft and aura_env.bottomRight
    then
        local message = format("%s*%s*%s*%s", aura_env.topLeft, aura_env.topRight, aura_env.bottomLeft, aura_env.bottomRight)
        C_ChatInfo.SendAddonMessage("HYLB_PERSONAL", message, IsInGroup(LE_PARTY_CATEGORY_INSTANCE) and "INSTANCE_CHAT" or "PARTY")
        
        local text = format("%s%s   %s%s", aura_env.topLeftM, aura_env.topLeft, aura_env.topRightM, aura_env.topRight)
        aura_env.send(text)
        
        text = format("%s%s   %s%s", aura_env.bottomLeftM, aura_env.bottomLeft, aura_env.bottomRightM, aura_env.bottomRight)
        aura_env.send(text)
    end
end
trigger.events: HYLB_TOPLEFT HYLB_TOPRIGHT HYLB_BOTTOMLEFT HYLB_BOTTOMRIGHT HYLB_RESET HYLB_SEND

trigger.custom:
function(states, event, ...)
    if event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" and ... then
        local _, message, _, srcGUID, srcName, _, _, destGUID, destName, _, _, spellid = ...
        if message == "SPELL_AURA_APPLIED"
        and destGUID == WeakAuras.myGUID
        and spellid == 346427
        then
            states[""] = {
                name = "Titanic Insight",
                icon = 135918,
                duration = 15,
                expirationTime = GetTime() + 15,
                progressType = "timed",
                autoHide = true,
                changed = true,
                show = true,
            }
        elseif message == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED"
        and destGUID == WeakAuras.myGUID
        and spellid == 346427
        and states[""]
        then
            states[""].show = false
            states[""].changed = true
            return true
        end
    end
end

init.custom:
aura_env.region.clickMe = aura_env.region.clickMe or CreateFrame("Button", nil, aura_env.region)
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetAllPoints()
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetScript("OnClick", function()
        WeakAuras.ScanEvents("HYLB_SEND", true)
end)
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetHighlightTexture("Interface\\QuestFrame\\UI-QuestLogTitleHighlight", "ADD")

aura_env.topLeft = false
aura_env.topRight = false
aura_env.bottomLeft = false
aura_env.bottomRight = false

aura_env.topLeftM = ""
aura_env.topRightM = ""
aura_env.bottomLeftM = ""
aura_env.bottomRightM = ""

aura_env.send = function(text)
    local chatType = "PARTY"
    if IsInGroup(LE_PARTY_CATEGORY_INSTANCE) then
        chatType = "INSTANCE_CHAT"
    end
    if not IsInGroup() then
        if text then
            local newtext = text:gsub("  ", "-")
            local new1, new2 = strsplit("-", newtext)
            if new1 and new2 then
                local index1 = new1:match("%d+")
                index1 = index1 and tonumber(index1)
                local side1 = new1:match("}(.+)")
                
                local index2 = new2:match("%d+")
                index2 = index2 and tonumber(index2)
                local side2 = new2:match("}(.+)")
                if index1 and side1 and index2 and side2 then
                    local fixprint = format("%s0|t%s  %s0|t%s", ICON_LIST[index1], side1, ICON_LIST[index2], side2)
                    print(fixprint)
                else
                    print(text)
                end
            else
                print(text)
            end
        end
    else
        SendChatMessage(text, chatType)
    end
end

start.custom:
aura_env.topLeft = false
aura_env.topRight = false
aura_env.bottomLeft = false
aura_env.bottomRight = false

aura_env.topLeftM = ""
aura_env.topRightM = ""
aura_env.bottomLeftM = ""
aura_env.bottomRightM = ""

WeakAuras.ScanEvents("HYLB_RESET", true)

init.custom:
aura_env.region.clickMe = aura_env.region.clickMe or CreateFrame("Button", nil, aura_env.region)
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetAllPoints()
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetScript("OnClick", function()
        WeakAuras.ScanEvents("HYLB_RESET", true)
end)
aura_env.region.clickMe:SetHighlightTexture("Interface\\QuestFrame\\UI-QuestLogTitleHighlight", "ADD")

trigger.custom:
function(states, event, ...)
    if event == "CHAT_MSG_ADDON" and ... then
        local prefix, message = ...
        if prefix == "HYLB_PERSONAL" and message then
            local topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight = strsplit("*", message)
            if topLeft and topRight and bottomLeft and bottomRight then
                local cfg = aura_env.config
                states[""] = {
                    side = {
                        [topLeft] = cfg["1"],
                        [topRight] = cfg["2"],
                        [bottomLeft] = cfg["3"],
                        [bottomRight] = cfg["4"],
                    },
                    progressType = "static",
                    changed = true,
                    show = true,
                }
                return true
            end
            
        end
    elseif event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" and ... then
        local _, message, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, spellid = ...
        local state = states[""]
        if state and (message == "SPELL_AURA_APPLIED" or message == "SPELL_AURA_REMOVED") and spellid == 347097 then
            state.show = false
            state.changed = true
            return true
        end
    end
end

children.customText:
function()
    if aura_env.states[2].show
    and aura_env.states[1].show
    and aura_env.states[1].spellId
    then
        local spellID = aura_env.states[1].spellId
        local convert = aura_env.list[spellID]
        if convert and aura_env.states[2].side[convert] then
            return aura_env.states[2].side[convert]
        end
    end
end
